debug_info.goal:
case cons
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
elt hd : α
tl : List α
HR : ∀ {idx : ℕ} {hidx : idx ≤ l1.length}, (tl ++ l2).insertIdx idx elt = tl.insertIdx idx elt ++ l2
idx : ℕ
hidx : idx ≤ l1.length
⊢ (hd :: (tl ++ l2)).insertIdx idx elt = (hd :: tl).insertIdx idx elt ++ l2

failed_attempts: cases idx <;> simp_all [HR]

cases idx with
        | zero => simp
        | succ n =>
          simp
          rw [HR]
          simp at hidx
          exact hidx

cases idx with
        | zero => simp
        | succ n =>
          simp
          apply HR
          simp at hidx
          exact hidx
cases idx <;> simp_all [HR]

| succ n =>
          simp
          apply HR
          exact Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ hidx

cases idx
        · simp
        · simp
          apply HR
          simpa using hidx

cases idx with

        | succ n =>
          simp
          apply HR
          simpa using hidx
cases idx <;> simp_all [HR]
cases idx <;> simp_all [HR]

        exact Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ hidx

cases idx <;> simp_all [HR]

cases idx with

        | succ n =>

cases idx <;> simp

        simp at hidx; exact hidx

cases idx

match idx, hidx with

        | n + 1, hidx =>

          rw [HR (hidx := Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ hidx)]

· simp

          simp at hidx
